nav.tagline: Connecting caring owners with trusted pet professionals.

home.heroSubtitle: Safe walks, happy pets, peace of mind. Find verified dog walkers and certified animal behavior specialists near you.
home.howItWorksDesc: Finding trusted care for your pets is simple and secure
home.step1Desc: Browse verified dog walkers and behavior specialists in your area. Read reviews, check ratings, and compare services.
home.step2Desc: Select your preferred professional, choose a date and time, and book securely through our platform.
home.step3Desc: Follow walks in real-time with GPS tracking, receive photo updates, and get detailed service reports.
home.whyDesc: Trust, safety, and peace of mind are at the core of everything we do
home.verifiedProfessionalsDesc: Every walker and specialist undergoes a thorough background check and verification process.
home.gpsTrackingDesc: Follow your pet's walk live on the map. Know exactly where they are at all times.
home.photoUpdatesDesc: Receive regular photo and video updates during walks so you never miss a moment.
home.trustedReviewsDesc: Read honest reviews from real pet owners to make informed decisions.
home.wellnessDesc: Access behavioral specialists to ensure your pet's emotional and mental wellbeing.
home.communityDesc: Join a caring community of pet lovers who prioritize pet happiness and safety.
home.forProfessionalsDesc: Join PawLink and grow your pet care business. Connect with pet owners in your area, build your reputation, and earn consistently.
home.profBenefits1: Get discovered by thousands of pet owners
home.profBenefits2: Set your own schedule and rates
home.profBenefits3: Build your professional profile with reviews
home.profBenefits5: Access to premium features and analytics
home.professionalsRateDesc: Top-rated walkers on PawLink earn competitive rates with consistent bookings. Join our growing network of professionals.
home.testimonial1Quote: PawLink gave me peace of mind. I can see exactly where my dog is during walks and the photo updates are wonderful.
home.testimonial2Quote: As a dog walker, PawLink helped me grow my client base significantly. The platform handles payments and scheduling seamlessly.
home.testimonial3Quote: The behavior consultation service is amazing. I got expert advice that improved my dog's anxiety issues within weeks.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to give your pet the best care?
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of happy pet owners and trusted professionals on PawLink today.

about.title: About PawLink
about.heroDesc: PawLink is a trust-first pet care platform that connects pet owners with verified dog walkers and certified animal behavior specialists through a secure, transparent, and technology-driven ecosystem.
about.missionDesc: To provide pet owners with peace of mind by connecting them with trusted pet care professionals while improving the health, happiness, and well-being of their pets.
about.visionDesc: To become the leading pet care marketplace in Latin America, offering technology-driven solutions that improve pet wellness and strengthen trust between pet owners and pet care professionals.
about.trustSafetyDesc: Every professional is thoroughly vetted and verified. We prioritize the safety of your pets above all else.
about.petHappinessDesc: The well-being and happiness of every pet is at the heart of everything we do.
about.communityDesc: We believe in the power of community. Pet owners and professionals working together for the love of pets.
about.transparencyDesc: Real-time GPS tracking, photo updates, and detailed reports ensure complete transparency.
about.innovationDesc: We continuously leverage technology to improve pet care services and user experience.
about.responsibilityDesc: We take our responsibility seriously, ensuring reliable and professional pet care services.

payments.plinDesc: Pay with Plin, scan the QR code
